titleStmt.title: SII 11.88: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 88. (B.K. No. 34 of 1928-29). ARASIBĪḌI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING ON A HILL TO THE RIGHT OF THE JAINA-BASTI.

summary.p: The inscription is in Kannaḍa and refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva (Sōmēsśvara I). It registers a gift of land made at Paṁpeya-tīrtha to the forty-two learned Brahmans of the Brahmapurī at the capital Vikramapura by Akkādēvī while she was governing the Kisukāḍu Seventy division.

The record is dated Śaka 975, Vijaya, Mārggaśira, amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse. This would correspond to A.D. 1053, November 13, if Mārgaśira is taken as pūrṇimānta. The week-day was, however, Saturday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaSomething like a flower-design seems to separate pa and ra.
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattrailōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . svastyarinṛpamakuṭaghaṭṭitecaraṇāraviṁdeya rggaṅgāsnānapavitreya
rddīnānāthaciṁtāmaṇi vivēkacūḍāmaṇiga ḷēkavākyeya rgguṇadabeḍaṁgiyarappa śrī madakkādēviyaru ki
sukāḍerppattumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷenadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgēyyuttamire . svasti saka
varṣa 975 neya vijaya saṁvatsarada mārggaśira damāvāsye Ādityavāra sūryyagrahaṇa daṁdu paṁpeya
tīrtthadalu śrirājadhāni vikramapurada brahmapuriya naṁdiyaṇnaṣaḍaṁgibhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru pramukhaṁ nā
lvattirvvaru vidvāṁsarappa mahājanakke sarvvanamaśyamāge Ūra dakṣiṇadiśāvaradalu koṭṭa kei Oṁdu tōṁṭada bhū
mi yeḷpattaṟa kōlalu mattaru 44 kisuvina bhūmi mattaru 64 Īntīdharmamaṁ svadharmmadalu kakṣisidavaru
vāraṇāsiya loṁdu kōṭi kavileyuma nanibaru vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgoṭṭa phalamaneydu va
ru Idharmmama naḷidava rā sthāneda lanibarbrāhmaṇaruma nanitu kavileyuma naḷida dōṣama neydavaru .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālēkālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhū
yōbhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvariṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyattē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
